emails.subject: Re: Atlantic Richfield Company 4/9/01
emails.body: Re: Atlantic Richfield Company 4/9/01 I spoke with Chris, and he called Alicia who said she still believes the deal should be for April, not May. Chris said they are in a dispute at this point, because he believes the term should be May. So he asked me to leave the deals alone for the moment, and he will be in touch later today. Would you like me to make a note of this in the comments sections of the deals? Kate Stephanie Piwetz 04/11/2001 07:55 AM

emails.subject: Atlantic Richfield Company 4/9/01
emails.body: Atlantic Richfield Company 4/9/01 Kate, I called Alicia Izarraraz from Atlantic to verbal trades and she was inquiring about the term of trade, May delivery, she thought they were going to be for April delivery. Deals 576274.01, 576275.01. Kate, can you ask Chris to call regarding inquiry. Her cell phone is 949-637-4878, her desk number 562-499-3201 she said she will be out if the office soon. No broker, done direct. Thanks Sp
